_meta.description: Global damage-formula constants for the ZZZ DMG Optimizer. anomaly_level_multipliers: community curve gives 1.9971 at 60, stored as the commonly quoted 2.0 - PROVISIONAL until in-game anomaly calibration pins it. skill_tags: the game's skill-type categories (Fandom Combat Skill page, verified 2026-07-02) used to gate skill-type-conditional DMG% bonuses like Puffer Electro's Ultimate DMG +20%. sheer_force_atk_conversion: Rupture agents' ATK -> Sheer Force rate (zenless-optimizer datamine 2026-07-10, common/index.ts: initial/combat sheerForce = atk x 0.3, rupture specialty only) - CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-10 (Rupture calibration #1: Yixuan panel + popup exact to 0.04%).
